summary: A precision release — every button, form, and tap audited and fixed. The small things that felt slightly off are now exactly right.

items.title: One tap to edit
items.description: Tapping 'Edit' now takes you straight into the editor — no intermediate screen.

items.title: Tailor & Interview from Resume Detail
items.description: Both actions now appear on the Resume Detail page and correctly load your resume into context before navigating.

items.title: ATS Improve opens your resume
items.description: The Improve shortcut in your ATS breakdown now always loads the correct resume.

items.title: Shortcuts go exactly where they say
items.description: All quick-action cards navigate correctly regardless of sign-in status.

items.title: Smart keyboards everywhere
items.description: Phone, URL, and email fields now trigger the right keyboard layout on mobile.

items.title: Signing out returns you home
items.description: Sign-out now lands on the home screen — not the login page.

summary: Your resume is now a full personal website — with themes, AI-written content, and a shareable link you can send to anyone.

items.title: Public Portfolio Website
items.description: Turn your resume into a beautiful personal site in one tap and share a real link with recruiters or clients.

items.title: Portfolio themes & hero redesign
items.description: Bold hero, animated avatar glow, sticky scroll header, and four curated themes: Minimal, Bold Dark, Glass Pro, Classic Clean.

items.title: Case Studies & Services sections
items.description: Portfolio-only content blocks with challenge, outcome, tech used, and optional pricing.

items.title: Resume ↔ Portfolio sync mode
items.description: Choose Auto-sync (live) or Locked (snapshot) so your portfolio stays stable while you keep editing.

items.title: AI portfolio content helpers
items.description: AI can write your About section, a Case Study from a project, and availability headlines — with preview before applying.

summary: Reliability and resilience — your work is safer, your data smarter about conflicts, and the experience tighter on mobile.

items.title: Unsaved changes guard
items.description: The editor detects unsaved changes and prompts Save, Discard, or Cancel before you navigate away — including Android back button.

items.title: Offline sync conflict detection
items.description: If a resume changed on another device, a clear dialog lets you pick the server or local version.

items.title: 44px touch targets everywhere
items.description: All interactive elements in the editor and tracker now meet the mobile accessibility standard.

items.title: Mobile delete confirmation
items.description: Deleting an application now opens a thumb-friendly bottom drawer instead of triggering immediately.

summary: AI status at a glance, 30+ templates, and a settings page rebuilt from scratch.

items.title: Real-time AI health indicator
items.description: Live status badge shows gateway latency and availability on every AI-powered page.

items.title: 30+ resume templates
items.description: Template library expanded to 30+ professional designs across every industry and career level.

items.title: Settings page overhaul
items.description: Added sign-out confirmation, change password, privacy toggles, account stats card, and guest user prompt.

items.title: Dynamic changelog
items.description: Release notes now load from a JSON file at runtime — no code changes needed to update them.

items.title: Version history, content library & proofread
items.description: Three new editor tools: restore past snapshots, reuse saved content blocks, and run a full AI proofread.

summary: The tailoring experience got a complete animation and feedback overhaul — and mobile scrolling works the way it should.

items.title: Polished tailor loading screen
items.description: Real-feel progress animation with cubic ease, animated percentage, glowing bar, ETA countdown, and fun facts carousel.

items.title: Projected score preview
items.description: Live before/after ATS score comparison and skill gap count shown during the tailoring process.

items.title: Mobile scroll fixes
items.description: Fixed non-scrollable pages on Job Details, Application Details, Cover Letters, and Notifications.

summary: Your career toolkit — plan your path, close your skill gaps, and write your resignation letter with AI.

items.title: Career Path Advisor
items.description: AI-powered career roadmap with milestones, timeline, and recommended next roles based on your resume.

items.title: Skill Gap Analyzer
items.description: See exactly which skills you're missing for your target role and get learning recommendations.

items.title: Resignation Letter generator
items.description: AI drafts your resignation letter with tone selection, notice period, and a pre-departure checklist.

items.title: Career Guides library
items.description: Curated guides on resumes, interviews, and job searching — readable in-app, no browser needed.

items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Press ⌘K anywhere to instantly jump to any page or action in the app.

summary: AI Studio launched — five specialized AI tools for the serious job seeker, all in one hub.

items.title: AI Studio hub
items.description: Central AI workspace with Wise AI Chat, quick tools, and one-tap access to every AI feature.

items.title: Recruiter Simulation
items.description: A simulated recruiter reviews your resume and tells you what would make them move forward — or not.

items.title: LinkedIn Optimizer
items.description: Adapt your resume content for LinkedIn with tailored headline, summary, and bullet rewrites.

items.title: A/B Resume Compare
items.description: Compare two resume versions side-by-side with score breakdown and section-level diffs.

items.title: AI Content Detector
items.description: Detect AI-sounding language in your resume and humanize it with one tap.

items.title: One-Page Wizard
items.description: AI compresses your resume to one page while preserving all the content that matters.

summary: Track every application, generate cover letters instantly, and stay on top of your job search — all in one place.

items.title: Job Application Tracker
items.description: Track every application through Saved → Applied → Interview → Offer with an activity timeline and follow-up reminders.

items.title: Follow-up email composer
items.description: AI drafts a follow-up email for any application with the right tone for the stage you're at.

items.title: Cover Letters
items.description: AI generates a tailored cover letter from your resume and a job description — editable, exportable as PDF.

items.title: Job Match Score
items.description: Every saved job shows a match score against your primary resume before you even apply.

items.title: Notifications & Profile page
items.description: In-app notification center and a dedicated profile page with career level, open-to-work status, and social links.

summary: Get your existing resume into WiseResume in seconds — and browse real examples for inspiration.

items.title: PDF & DOCX import
items.description: Upload any resume PDF or Word document and WiseResume parses it into a fully editable resume.

items.title: OCR image import
items.description: Snap a photo of a printed resume and the OCR engine extracts all your content automatically.

items.title: Resume Examples Gallery
items.description: Browse curated resume examples by industry and experience level for inspiration or to use as a starting point.

items.title: Public share links
items.description: Share a read-only link to your resume with anyone — no account required to view it.

items.title: PWA install & offline mode
items.description: Install WiseResume as an app on your home screen and keep working even without a connection.

summary: WiseResume launches — a professional resume builder with AI writing, ATS scoring, and cloud sync.

items.title: AI-powered resume editor
items.description: Section-by-section editing with AI enhancement on every field — summary, bullets, skills, and more.

items.title: ATS scoring
items.description: Instant ATS compatibility score with keyword analysis and actionable improvement suggestions.

items.title: 12 professional templates
items.description: Clean, Modern, Classic, Executive, Developer, Creative, and six more — all ATS-safe.

items.title: PDF & DOCX export
items.description: Export your resume as a print-ready PDF or editable Word document in one tap.

items.title: AI Interview Prep
items.description: Practice with an AI interviewer that asks role-specific questions and scores your answers.

items.title: Cloud sync & biometric lock
items.description: Your data syncs across devices and can be secured with Face ID or fingerprint on supported devices.
